review_text: Mediocre. Sweet Lassi were fine but forgettable. Sweet Lassi didn't stand out.
Enjoyed the Masala Chai  Sweet Lassi  Chicken 65  and Chole Bhature! Chole Bhature was very good. Portion sizes were generous. Recommend!
Absolutely amazing Fresh Lime Soda  Chicken 65  Aloo Tikki Chaat  and Masala Chai! The Masala Chai was cooked to perfection. Fresh ingredients and authentic flavors. Highly recommend!
Enjoyed the Sweet Lassi  Aloo Tikki Chaat  and Chicken Seekh Kebab! Aloo Tikki Chaat was very good. Portion sizes were generous. Recommend!
Expected better. Vegetable Biryani were subpar. Vegetable Biryani was too oily and greasy. Stomach upset followed.
Not good. Palak Paneer  Aloo Tikki Chaat  Tandoori Roti  Paneer Butter Masala  and Samosa (2 pcs) arrived late and cold. Palak Paneer had barely any flavor. Poor quality.
Solid experience. Sweet Lassi  Rasmalai (2 pcs)  Dal Makhani  and Gulab Jamun (2 pcs) were well-prepared. Rasmalai (2 pcs) had great flavor. Minor issues with packaging.
Wow! Just wow! Kulfi  Palak Paneer  Fresh Lime Soda  and Butter Naan were all fantastic. Palak Paneer was particularly memorable. Can't wait to order again!
Wow! Just wow! Chicken Seekh Kebab were all fantastic. Chicken Seekh Kebab was particularly memorable. Can't wait to order again!
Hands down the best Paneer Tikka I've ever had! Paneer Tikka were all prepared beautifully. Fresh and flavorful!
Terrible experience! Lamb Rogan Josh  Jeera Rice  Butter Naan  Chicken Tikka Masala  and Chicken 65 were all inedible. Butter Naan was completely burnt. Waste of money!
Best Indian food in UAE! Rasmalai (2 pcs)  Chicken Tikka Masala  Naan  and Lamb Rogan Josh were incredible. Rasmalai (2 pcs) had the perfect balance of spices. Five stars!
Best Indian food in UAE! Chole Bhature  Paneer Butter Masala  Kulfi  Chicken 65  and Fish Curry were incredible. Fish Curry had the perfect balance of spices. Five stars!
Incredible meal! Jeera Rice  Naan  Paneer Butter Masala  and Gulab Jamun (2 pcs) arrived hot and fresh. The Gulab Jamun (2 pcs) was absolutely divine. Highly satisfied!

Hands down the best Malai Kofta I've ever had! Tandoori Roti  Paneer Tikka  and Malai Kofta were all prepared beautifully. Fresh and flavorful!
Great food overall. Paneer Butter Masala  Naan  Vegetable Biryani  Gulab Jamun (2 pcs)  and Butter Chicken were tasty  especially the Naan. Would order again!
